title: Power Strike
description: IN BETA. Adds the gauntlets from legacy Bakugan into the game as weapons, complete with ability cards to augment attacks.
body:
This mod adds the six gauntlets from the Bakugan anime as well as ability cards to add a completely new way of fighting!

Gauntlets can be switched into sword mode by shift-right-clicking them in your offhand. Some abilities may only apply to either the base or sword mode of your gauntlet, encouraging swapping modes mid-battle.

Currently only adds the Pyrus, Darkus, and Ventus gauntlets and 10 total ability cards.

To be added:

-The remaining three gauntlets 

-Fusion ability cards

-More abilities for each attribute

-Gate cards and related abilities (maybe)
